name: Morning Glory Muffins-1
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple, Peeled and Core Removed, Chopped
2 Tablespoons Walnuts or Pecans, Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Lightly oil 18 muffin cups or coat with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, stir together flours, sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir in grated carrots, chopped apple, and raisins.
5. In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together eggs, egg whites, oil, and vanilla extract.
6. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
7. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full.
8. Sprinkle the walnut and wheat germ mixture over the muffin tops.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown and spring back when lightly pressed.
10. Makes 18 muffins.
